name: docx-to-wangeditor
description: Convert Word (.docx) into HTML that pastes correctly into a wangEditor rich-text editor. 把 Word 文档转成能正确粘进 wangEditor 富文本编辑框的 HTML。

plugins.name: docx-to-wangeditor-html
plugins.description: Convert Word (.docx) into clean semantic HTML that pastes correctly into a wangEditor rich-text editor (preserves headings/bold/tables; de-schemes URLs to avoid the paste-flatten bug). 把 Word 转成可直接粘进 wangEditor 富文本编辑器的干净 HTML。
